philosophy.label: Our Philosophy
philosophy.desc1: In a world of noise, MD finds the signal. We believe that every problem has a solution hidden within the data, the patterns, and the shadows.
philosophy.desc2: Our methodology is rooted in the principles of intelligence gathering used by elite agencies, adapted for the private sector. We don't just find facts; we provide clarity.

privacy.agree: I agree to the collection and use of personal information.
privacy.title: Consent to Collection and Use of Personal Information
privacy.content:
1. Purpose and Items of Collection
'MD Intelligence' (hereinafter 'the Company') collects the following personal information to provide seamless consultation.
- Items Collected: Name, Phone Number, Email
- Purpose of Collection: Customer consultation and securing communication channels

2. Automatically Collected Information
When using the website, the following information may be automatically collected and stored.
- Items Collected: Access logs, cookies, access IP information, acquisition path, etc.

3. Period of Retention and Use
The Company retains minimal personal information only for the duration of providing consultation and services.
- Withdrawal of Consent: You may withdraw your consent to provide information at any time.
- Principle of Destruction: The personal information will be destroyed without delay upon the user's request for withdrawal, achievement of purpose, expiration of the retention period, or discontinuation of business.

4. Right to Refuse Consent
You have the right to refuse consent to the collection and use of personal information above. However, if you refuse consent, there may be restrictions on submitting inquiries and using services.
